absorption: Aggressive selling (Delta -289, heavy market sells on DOM at 61220-61200) is being absorbed by passive buyers at the vPOC level, preventing a price breakdown.
dom_observation: Heavy selling is hitting the bids at 61220-61200, but price is holding firm at the vPOC. A large bid wall is visible lower at 61100, providing potential support.
reasoning: Aggressive sellers are failing to break the key vPOC support due to strong passive bid absorption, indicating a high probability of a rotation back up within the value area.
